title: Soulection White Label: 009
content:
Here we are on another grateful Friday and returning with one of our veterans from the Soulection crew: AbJo. This man has not only been around since the beginning of Soulection but has also been one who has truly stayed true to his signature and diverse sound.

It is tough to replicate his sound. On this White Label, AbJo takes us on a musical journey full of complex but intricate drum patterns that are full of melodies and rhythms that fall into place some how, some way. This is that deep thought music and if you enjoy this... please feel free to share it!
